Great Scouts!: CyberGuides for Subject Searching on the Web

Nora Paul, Margot Williams, Paula Hane editor (Paula Hane) May 2000
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

A guide to using CyberGuides for effective subject searching on the web, reviewed for the IRE Journal's May issue.

"Great Scouts!: CyberGuides for Subject Searching on the Web" by Nora Paul, Margot Williams, Paula Hane (editor). Cyber-Age Books/ Information Today (www.infotoday.com). A review of this book will appear in the May issue of the IRE Journal.
